summary: Completed comprehensive testing of security hardening features and mobile navigation fix. All security features (headers, rate limiting, account lockout, password policy) are working correctly. Mobile navigation works properly on all public pages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security features are in-memory (rate limiter, account lockout) and reset on backend restart. Rate limit for login is 5 requests per minute. Account lockout triggers after 5 failed attempts for existing users.

security_headers.details: All 5 security headers present on all API responses: X-Frame-Options: DENY, X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block, Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin, Permissions-Policy: geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=()

rate_limiting.details: Rate limiting on /api/auth/login works correctly. Allows 5 requests per minute, 6th request returns 429 'Too many requests' with Retry-After header.

account_lockout.details: After 5 failed login attempts for existing user, account is locked for 15 minutes. Returns 429 'Too many failed attempts. Account temporarily locked.' Subsequent attempts blocked by rate limiter.

password_policy.details: Password policy enforced on registration - requires 8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, digit, special char. Weak passwords rejected with 422 status.

mobile_navigation_landing.details: Landing page hamburger menu appears on mobile, shows Blog, Videos, News, About, Login links. Get Started button visible in header. Menu opens/closes correctly.

news_page.details: News page at /news loads correctly, uses PublicNav component, mobile navigation works. Displays news items with RSS badge if from RSS feed.

public_pages_mobile_nav.details: Blog, Videos, News, About pages all use PublicNav component with mobile-friendly navigation (hamburger menu on mobile screens).
